notes: Main pass-3 Markdown is reflowed for clean reading while retaining PDF page anchors.
Table extraction is indexed and partly normalized; complex linguistic tables are retained as raw blocks for manual verification before data use.
Examples were indexed by numbered example label; complex multi-line examples should be checked against the page image before quotation or data extraction.
Figures are indexed by caption only; image/diagram content was not redrawn.
PDF pages without text anchors are cover/blank or pages with no retained extractable text: 1, 2, 18, 40
